flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of St Thomas rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6k → 3.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of St Thomas rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (35.4% → 43.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of St Thomas rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (61.6% → 68.8%).
